entities.clown: a clown with a red nose

scenes.title: The Carnival
scenes.background_prompt: A colorful carnival with striped tents, a ticket booth, string lights, and a popcorn cart. Evening light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A colorful carnival in the warm evening light. A clown with a round red nose, curly green wig, and oversized polka-dot suspenders stands near a striped red and white tent, waving at passersby with a white-gloved hand. A girl of about eight in a blue dress holds a large stick of pink cotton candy in one hand, looking up at the clown with wide eyes and a delighted smile. To the right, a juggler in a purple vest and black top hat tosses three bright yellow balls in a smooth arc above his head, concentrating intently. String lights in warm white stretch between poles overhead. A popcorn cart with a glass display and red wheels sits in the background, and the smell of caramel seems to fill the air.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place clown near the striped tent (left), standing and waving with one white-gloved hand. Place girl in front of the clown (center), standing and looking up at him, holding cotton candy in one hand. Place juggler to the right, standing and tossing three yellow balls in an arc above his head.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground at the bottom of the scene, a green grassy field is dotted with small purple, white, yellow, and orange flowers, as well as several four-leaf clovers. Moving from left to right in the midground, a large rounded green tree with a brown trunk stands on the far left. To its right, a clown with curly orange hair, a white-painted face, and a red nose stands facing right. The clown wears a jumpsuit with red, yellow, and blue vertical stripes, a blue ruffled collar, white gloves, and large red shoes, and is waving its left hand. Behind the clown is another rounded green tree. To the right of the clown, a girl with brown braided hair tied with blue flowers stands facing left. She wears a yellow dress with orange floral patterns and holds a cone of pink cotton candy. Behind the girl is a large circus tent with red and white vertical stripes and a red flag at its peak. A string of glowing yellow circular lights stretches from the tree on the left, across the front of the tent, and toward the right side of the scene. To the right of the girl and the tent is a wooden booth with a red and white striped awning and a small grey box on its counter. Further to the right, a juggler with short brown hair, wearing a white shirt, a patterned brown vest, and brown pants, stands facing forward while juggling five yellow balls in an arc. Behind the juggler is a smaller red and white striped tent. To the far right is a wooden popcorn cart with large brown wheels and a red and white striped awning, filled with yellow popcorn. The background behind the tents and characters is filled with several large, rounded green trees, and in the far distance, rolling blue and purple hills meet the horizon under a light blue sky filled with fluffy white clouds, indicating a bright, clear day.
